name: Peoplebox
description: Most-Integrated Performance Management platform with unmatched customization to help HR teams drive high team performance their way. Learn more about Peoplebox

reviews.review_title: Exceptional performance & Employee Engagement tool
reviews.review_pros: ntuitive User Interface: The tool offers a user-friendly interface that is easy to navigate, ensuring a seamless user experience for both employees and managers.Streamlined Performance Management: The tool simplifies the performance management process, making it more efficient and time-saving for all stakeholders involved.Real-time Feedback and Goal Tracking: The tool enables employees to receive timely feedback and track their goals, fostering continuous improvement and motivation.
reviews.review_cons: Learning Curve: Depending on the complexity of the tool, some employees may require additional time and training to fully understand and utilize all its features effectively.

reviews.review_title: Peoplebox- Review
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Interactive and realtime update of goals
reviews.review_cons: Nothing as a such. All features are good.

reviews.review_title: People Box review
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: The User interface components looks good
reviews.review_cons: Makes the user experience a little bit confusing

reviews.review_title: Great tool for OKR and PMS
reviews.review_pros: The ease of use of the solution is the best thing. It doesnt require any training.
reviews.review_cons: The Performance review is well build but it lacks some features like PDP, Career path etc

reviews.review_title: Easiest tool for starting to build an open culture in your company
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: What I like the best about the tool is that the tool empathizes with a beginner, it suggests topics for one-to-one meetings. It helps to break the ice with features like coffee connect.
reviews.review_cons: I wish that this tool also had other features like project and timeline management, that way it could have been just one tool we need for end-to-end people and goal management.

reviews.review_title: The best Employee Engagement Platform
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: The Survey, Scoring, Engagement and 1 on 1 setups are pretty powerful. They keep on enriching the platform and making it valuable.
reviews.review_cons: They need to add 360 review.......that will make it complete

reviews.review_title: Holistic user review. Using it for performance management
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: I am using this for performance management. A good tool to begin with for companies looking to setup performance management systems
reviews.review_pros: Home Tab The dashboard setup looks great. Provides users with information on checkins and any action items with your own team, showcases goals at company and department level and provides a shortcut option to set up 1-on-1s an setup goals for your department or reportees. Goals Tab Clean, simple and easy to understand user interface. Provides the ability to the user to view the options available on the page. The left side gives a clear view of goals at a company, department and individual level, bringing in transparency. Users can also review goals according to the review cycle they are currently in. This provides them the ability to review their performance or track progress of their/dept/company goals based upon the performance cycle. Explore Goals - A great feature to view and understand the goals of different employees across various functions and divisions at the company. This also helps employees to align their goals with the goals of the company Company Goals - Gives information on the goals of the company to the employees. 1-on-1 Meetings Users have the ability to create 1-on-1 meetings with their reportees or any other employee within the company. Users can also sync their calendars to add events from their calendar. This can then be updated in their dashboard. E.g. A user would know that they have checked in with their respective peers/managers/reportees.
reviews.review_cons: Home Tab - It will be nice to see individual level goals of the user as well on the dashboard on the home page, thus, making it easier to do a quick review. Goals Tab - Ability to update company goals, even if the owner of the goals is somebody else. E.g. I can add 'Key Results' by accessing any of the company goals. Ideally, this shoul be allowed only to those individuals who are allocated company goals or are owners of those specific goals - Review of individual goals It would be nice to see text that indicates the serial number of my goals. For e.g. - Goals no 1 - Launch new business initiatives. While reviewing my individual goals, the option to upate activities is missing. Users should have the ability to state the key activities undertaken by them against each of the key results. There should also be an option to provide anonymous feedback to any user/employee at the company, especially those in your team, including your manager.

reviews.review_title: How People made us a better organisation
reviews.review_description: We loved using Peoplebox and recently paid for another year because we achieved tremendous goals as a team and as individuals.
reviews.review_pros: Allows our teams to understand their goals and track success.
reviews.review_cons: Everything works well, I cannot think about any glitch. Maybe the performance aspect could be improved.

reviews.review_title: Good platform to foster personalized remote-work 1-on-1s!
reviews.review_description: I could say with the founders it has been an interesting experience however in the context of the product its an okay experience given that there is so much this platform could have done. Needs to trust the employer and let them choose what's best for their organization. Be suggestive about things than forceful as a platform.
reviews.review_pros: We are a remote team working from various time zones and PeopleBox is an amazing platform for organizations like ours to care for the team members and foster deeper engagement and collaborations. The OKR feature is simple, effective, and easy to use. You can set goals for individuals, teams, and the Organization, as a whole. The pre-built surveys are a great starting point. Great to have all one-on-ones in one place. Simple and easy-to-understand insights.
reviews.review_cons: It does not trust the employers who have bought the platform. Unfortunately, it offers no flexibility to decide when we need to receive anonymous feedback and when we can have open feedback. Heavy on anonymous feedback which is a least likely thing about PeopleBox. Other things I least like about this software is that it lacks: Team meetings agenda feature Threeway feedback loop Solid Mobile interface or app Relationship Tracker Rewards and Recognition

reviews.review_title: A Guide for Effective Meetings
reviews.review_description: The problem that we are trying to solve with Peoplebox is to provide Social-Emotional Support to our members and improve the engagement between managers and subordinates. We have been able to develop a significant relationship between the members of our organizations. Also, people have started trusting each other more; as a result, the level of ownership among members has increased significantly.
reviews.review_pros: The best thing about Peoplebox is the range of questions it recommends for your meeting with your colleagues or subordinate. The questions are very relevant to the discussion and help you in having an effective conversation.
reviews.review_cons: The one thing that they can improve on is to have themselves integrated with other platforms. At the moment, they offer integration with slack but not with Zulip Chat.

reviews.review_title: Using People Box for last 2 years and experience has been great
reviews.review_description: Loving the experience right now with seamless integration with google sheets
reviews.review_pros: Single platform for OKR and performance metric tracking, reviewing, and socializing + great with 3rd party integration like Google Sheets or Slack
reviews.review_cons: The templates can be a little tricky to work with and show the exact progress, which takes some time to align everyone on the presented view + can be slow at the time

reviews.review_title: Peoplebox Review
reviews.review_description: The product is amazing and can make a big impact in the market.
reviews.review_pros: All the features on the Peoplebox platform has its own unique feature whether it is OKRs, Business Reviews, 1on1s, and Performance Management review. it helps our company to stay focused and achieve all the milestones as per the requirement
reviews.review_cons: Peoplebox is new in the market, so quick TAT is required on the bug fixing and new enhancements should be implemented on a fast pace to stay competitive in the market

reviews.review_title: A great product that has revolutionised our people and experience
reviews.review_description: I love the tool and can not see us scaling without it. As we grow it becomes even more important to ensure that we are making our company the better place to work and supporting our people. People box ensure that we keep our finger on the pulse
reviews.review_pros: I like the fact that the tool is simple to use. Provides guidance where needed and most importantly it is effective. The team are also very responsive It has enabled us to improve how we support our people and has truly allowed us to move our People and Experience to a new level. The tool is now our fundamental part of our HR
reviews.review_cons: What I dislike is nothing to do with the tool. It's the insights that you get back, which can sometimes slap you in the face (in a good way). You as a business owner think that your doing well and that your putting everything in place to ensure that your a great to work. Using people box has enabled us to uncover our blind spots and in turn improve our people and experience.

reviews.review_title: Pros and Cons of Using Peoplebox in Organisations
reviews.review_pros: Peoplebox is extremely easy to use and helps keep track of you and your teams goals,KPI's, reviews all in one place
reviews.review_cons: Some features kind of overstep on other features such as goal management and progress tracking, it's basically sort of the same thing or can be used for the same purpose

reviews.review_title: I would recommend people box to huge number because people box is awesome tool for organizations
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: I have 4 months of experience about people box
reviews.review_pros: Everything in people box is simply awesome
reviews.review_cons: Nothing is missing in people box this is simply awesome

reviews.review_title: Easy to understand and easily can track employees KPI
reviews.review_pros: It is very easy to use.We can easily navigate.
reviews.review_cons: Nothing as much, they can just change the colour coding.

reviews.review_title: Good Product
reviews.review_pros: TA and Goal Setting/TrackingProgress TrackingMetrics Tracking
reviews.review_cons: NA. I am used to this product and loving it

reviews.review_title: Benefits of using peoplebox
reviews.review_pros: It is easy to use.You can define multiple goals with the criteria.
reviews.review_cons: Till now I found no improvements as peoplebox satisfies my user role.

reviews.review_title: PEOPLEBOX : Unique tool for making professional life at ease
reviews.review_pros: Its very user friendly interface and a lot of integrations
reviews.review_cons: Suggestions provided for 1-1meetings to discuss on the goal parts

reviews.review_title: Very Good Product
reviews.review_pros: Performance Management system. Goal Setting
reviews.review_cons: Self-Goal ratingSome Back Ends Errordefective

reviews.review_title: Easy to get plan
reviews.review_pros: Easy way to add the notes with 1 on 1 conversation with manager
reviews.review_cons: Easy way to add the notes with 1 on 1 conversation with manager

reviews.review_title: Efficient management system that saves my time in day-to-day basis.
reviews.review_description: It's good and easy to use.
reviews.review_pros: I am able to track my tasks in day-to-day work in the most efficient way. Its 1:1 feature is really good. Also, the task tracking feature and its integration with Slack and Jira are flawless.
reviews.review_cons: It went down for a couple of days last week. We weren't been able to use it. It was a blocker for us.

reviews.review_title: A platform for all things People
reviews.review_description: The tools help our people-operations team to sustain quarterly goals and PDPs of individual employees. Along with this, we're upholding and executing 1:1 with managers & team leaders with so much ease with the help of the tool.
reviews.review_pros: I really like and love how well the organization has synchronized all its members. The User Interface is something that I particularly appreciate due to its straightforward and easy-to-understand design. Additionally, it serves as an excellent means of keeping track of KPIs and goals.
reviews.review_cons: So far, I haven't faced any issues or least likely features of this product. We use the platform regularly, and I believe that it fulfills all of its purposes with a high level of quality and maintenance.

reviews.review_title: Feedback Form
reviews.review_description: Overall experience is good with the tool as it is helping me to clearly define my goals and get evaluated on them from my manager at the end of the quarter.
reviews.review_pros: Structured way of defining goals and amazing visualisation of Company OKRs to team OKRs
reviews.review_cons: Little bit latency while toggling from one screen to another screen.

reviews.review_title: Great Product! Works like a charm for teams hustling for 1-10 growth
reviews.review_pros: Ease of Use, Helps to Plan and schedule my 1-1s in Advance, Makes the OKRs Management quite reliable.
reviews.review_cons: Can Streamline use of goals, projects, key results. Department Wise Templates can be added to create a flexible yet uniformed hierarchy.
